title: chenopodium howellii
intro: Chenopodium howellii, also known as Howell's goosefoot, is a type of annual plant that belongs to the Chenopodiaceae family and is native to the western United States. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory compounds. The health benefits of Chenopodium howellii include reducing fever, alleviating coughs, and providing relief from various skin irritations. Chenopodium howellii can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in herbal remedies to treat various health conditions.
